Portfolio

Projects

Real problems, real data, real stakeholders — from quantitative research and applied machine learning to AI systems and data engineering. Filter by track to explore the work most relevant to you.

Quant AI Data

Private Equity Forecast Analysis

The Riverside Company · Quantitative Analyst Lead (team of 7)

Led a 7-person team through a multi-question analysis of Riverside’s portfolio, combining statistical testing (chi-square, logistic regression) and time-series regression on IRR / GCoC to evaluate projection accuracy, surface sector-level patterns, and flag early outperformance / underperformance signals. Quantified the relationship between EBITDA/Sales projection accuracy and exit success and found no statistically significant link — a counterintuitive result that reframed the client’s underwriting assumptions. Delivered an MVP dashboard and technical documentation for internal handoff.

Python Logistic Regression Time-Series Chi-Square Dashboard Leadership

Code

AI / FDE

Wikipedia RAG ChatBot

Team Leader (team of 3) · R · Shiny · OpenAI + MediaWiki APIs · Posit Cloud

Architected and deployed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation web application with an automated query-optimization pipeline and source-grounded prompt design that reduces LLM hallucination in generated answers. Built a reactive UI with session-based history and exportable citations, enabling end-to-end use from query to verifiable, cited answer.

R Shiny RAG OpenAI API MediaWiki API

Code Live Demo

Quant Data AI

Predicting NFIP Flood Claims

FEMA National Flood Insurance Program · ~500K claims, 54 features

Built and benchmarked regression models (Lasso, Random Forest, XGBoost) on ~500K cleaned FEMA claims to predict flood-insurance payout amounts, with XGBoost achieving R² = 0.956 and an 80% RMSE reduction over baseline. Applied SHAP values and Partial Dependence Plots to translate model outputs into interpretable risk drivers, supporting insurance-pricing and disaster-risk-management use cases.

Python XGBoost Random Forest Lasso SHAP PDP

Data AI

NYC Air Quality Analysis

Interactive Data Dashboard · R · Shiny · Posit Cloud

Built an interactive Shiny dashboard analyzing a decade of NYC air quality — integrating the NYC DOHMH dataset (~18.9K records) with four socioeconomic datasets to examine temporal trends, spatial disparities, and pollution–socioeconomic relationships. Performed heavy cleaning in R (normalized names, engineered indicator categories, parsed messy time-period strings into start/end dates) and shipped a 5-tab app with interactive sf-polygon maps, NAAQS reference lines, and a custom-themed UI.

R Shiny tidyverse sf Spatial Analysis

Code Live Demo

Data AI

Who Is Responsible for Climate Change?

A Four-Lens Data Story · R · Quarto · Closeread

A data-storytelling piece examining climate responsibility through four empirically valid but conflicting metrics — total annual, per-capita, cumulative historical, and consumption-based emissions — across seven major emitters, showing how the same data yields four different verdicts depending on the fairness standard applied. Cleaned and reshaped the Our World in Data country-year panel (records back to 1750) and delivered it as a Closeread scrollytelling narrative with a sticky visualization panel and editorial typography.

R Quarto Closeread Data Storytelling OWID

AI / FDE Data

LLM Serving System — Scheduling Simulation

Discrete-Event Simulation · Python · Matplotlib

Built a discrete-event simulation of a single-GPU LLM-serving system modeling both phases of autoregressive inference — prefill and decode — with Poisson arrivals and batching constraints, to study how scheduling policy affects throughput and latency. Compared Complete-to-End vs. Prefill-first schedulers on throughput, TTFT, TBT, and total latency; validated with an M/M/1 reduction against closed-form queueing formulas. Identified a capacity-driven phase transition where decode is the fundamental bottleneck.

Python Discrete-Event Sim Queueing Theory Performance Analysis

AI / FDE Data

AI Job Search Assistant

Cornell INFO 5125 · Team of 7 · Project Planning & Documentation

A 7-person team built an AI-powered job-search platform for international students, integrating a visa-transparency dashboard (automated bi-weekly updates + conflict detection), semantic resume-to-job matching (FAISS + BERT), and a RAG-based Q&A assistant (ChromaDB) — a Streamlit prototype reaching ~85% matching accuracy. I owned core project-management deliverables: the team contract, the Work Breakdown Structure and Gantt chart coordinating the multi-track team, risk assessment, weekly tracking, and the final report.

Streamlit FAISS BERT ChromaDB RAG Project Management

AI / FDE

RoomExchange — University Housing Platform

Full-Stack · React · Leaflet + Mapbox APIs · 🏆 2nd Place, UC Davis Big Bang!

Architected a full-stack housing-swap platform enabling students to list and locate properties, addressing campus accommodation shortages. Engineered modular frontend logic and integrated Leaflet and Mapbox APIs for dynamic geolocation visualization — earning 2nd Place at the UC Davis Big Bang! Business Competition.

React Leaflet API Mapbox API Full-Stack Product Design

Code Live Demo

Quant AI

Personal Algorithmic Trading System

Personal Project · Python · Built with Claude Code

Built a personal algorithmic trading system, using Claude Code to rapidly prototype and iterate on quantitative strategy logic — analyzing market data, identifying signal patterns, and stress-testing model assumptions. Continuously validated AI-generated code against real market behavior, overriding model output where financial-data edge cases required human judgment before committing any logic.

Python Algorithmic Trading Signal Research Claude Code
